prompt: A detailed satirical countryball meme illustration of the {argument name="waterway name" default="Strait of Hormuz"} as a very narrow sea passage between two steep rocky cliffs, painted in a polished digital cartoon style with dramatic shading and textured stone. In the center foreground, exactly 2 countryballs block each other in the tight channel so that only one can pass. On the left is a USA countryball with angry narrowed eyes, painted with the American flag, wearing a dark navy baseball cap labeled "USA" in large white letters. On the right is an Iran countryball with angry narrowed eyes, painted with the Iranian flag and emblem, wearing a green-and-white headband tied on the side; the headband contains Korean text that reads "저항은 우리의 권리". Above each ball is exactly 1 white speech bubble with thick black outline, for a total of 2 speech bubbles, and both say {argument name="speech text" default="길!"} in large bold Korean lettering, as if neither side will yield. Show the two balls facing each other nose-to-nose in a standoff in the bottleneck. On the left cliff, include exactly 1 wooden sign reading in Korean and English: "호르무즈 해협" and "Strait of Hormuz". On the right cliff, include exactly 1 warning sign with Persian text at the top and a red warning triangle below, indicating that only one person can pass. In the left bottom corner, place exactly 1 black oil barrel labeled "OIL" with dark spilled oil pooling around it. In the right bottom corner, place exactly 1 black naval mine with Persian writing on it, attached to a chain. In the background beyond the narrow passage, show open sea with exactly 3 distant ships, including at least 1 larger tanker and faint dark smoke rising into the sky. Use a tense but humorous geopolitical meme tone, centered composition, eye-level view, soft daylight, slightly muted realistic colors, crisp outlines, and high readability for all text.
translatedPrompt: 一幅细致的讽刺性 Countryball meme 插画，描绘了 {argument name="waterway name" default="霍尔木兹海峡"}，将其表现为两座陡峭岩壁之间非常狭窄的海上通道，采用精致的数字卡通风格，具有戏剧性的阴影和岩石纹理。在中心前景处，正好有 2 个 Countryball 在狭窄的航道中互相阻挡，导致只有一方可以通过。左侧是一个美国 Countryball，有着愤怒的眯眯眼，身上画着美国国旗，戴着一顶深蓝色棒球帽，上面用白色大字写着“USA”。右侧是一个伊朗 Countryball，有着愤怒的眯眯眼，身上画着伊朗国旗和国徽，侧面系着一条绿白相间的头带；头带上印有韩文“저항은 우리의 권리”（抵抗是我们的权利）。每个球上方各有 1 个带有粗黑轮廓的白色对话气泡，总共 2 个气泡，内容均为 {argument name="speech text" default="길!"}（路！），用粗体韩文书写，仿佛双方都不肯让步。展示两个球在瓶颈处面对面僵持，鼻尖对着鼻尖。在左侧悬崖上，放置 1 个木牌，上面用韩文和英文写着：“호르무즈 해협”和“Strait of Hormuz”。在右侧悬崖上，放置 1 个警告标志，顶部有波斯语文字，下方有一个红色警告三角形，表示仅限一人通过。在左下角，放置 1 个标有“OIL”的黑色油桶，周围有深色的溢油。在右下角，放置 1 个带有波斯语文字并连接着铁链的黑色水雷。在狭窄通道后的背景中，展示开阔的海域，有 3 艘远处的船只，包括至少 1 艘大型油轮，远处有淡淡的黑烟升入天空。采用紧张但幽默的地缘政治 meme 基调，居中构图，平视视角，柔和的日光，略显柔和的写实色彩，清晰的轮廓，并确保所有文字具有高可读性。

breakdown.creativeCore: Countryball 霍尔木兹海峡对峙：一幅幽默的地缘政治 meme 插画，展示了美国和伊朗的 Countryball 在狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡对峙，非常适合社论讽刺或社交媒体评论。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
